precalculation.title: PCF Precalculation

subpartTooltip.pending: PCF request pending — use the send button to request PCF data from this supplier.
subpartTooltip.deliveredWithValue: PCF delivered: {{value}} {{unit}} — click to expand details.
subpartTooltip.deliveredNoValue: PCF data delivered to supplier — click to expand details.
subpartTooltip.receivedWithValue: PCF response received: {{value}} {{unit}} — click to expand details.
subpartTooltip.receivedNoValue: PCF response received from supplier — click to expand details.
subpartTooltip.updated: Certificate updated by supplier — click to expand details.
subpartTooltip.rejectedNoReason: Request was rejected by the supplier.
subpartTooltip.errorNoMessage: An error occurred while processing the PCF request — use the retry button.

precalculation.statusError: Could not retrieve PCF collection status from the server. Refresh to retry.
precalculation.downloadError: Download failed: {{message}}. Please check the backend and try again.

addSubpartDialog.title: Add Subpart Relation
addSubpartDialog.description: Enter the supplier BPN and manufacturer part ID to create a subpart relation and enable PCF data requests.
addSubpartDialog.bpnInvalidFormat: Invalid BPN format. Expected: BPNL or BPNS followed by 12 alphanumeric characters
addSubpartDialog.manufacturerPartIdHelper: The part ID as assigned by the supplier

management.title: PCF Management
management.subtitle: Manage and upload Product Carbon Footprint data for your catalog parts
management.searchSubtitle: Manage and upload PCF data for your catalog parts
management.pcfDataSubtitle: Product Carbon Footprint information for this part
management.stepRegisterDesc: Part must be registered in catalog
management.stepUploadDesc: Upload PCF data for this part
management.registerDescription: This part is currently in draft status. Register it in the catalog to enable PCF data management.
management.uploadDescription: Your catalog part is registered. Upload PCF data to enable carbon footprint tracking and sharing.
management.incompleteDescription: This part is missing the following PCF version(s): {{versions}}. Complete it so both versions are available.
management.draftAlert: This PCF is in draft status. Upload it to make it available for sharing with customers.
management.sectionSubtitle: Manage Product Carbon Footprint data for this part
management.noPcfDataHint: Upload PCF data to respond to customer requests

quality.medium: Medium quality — mix of primary and secondary data

management.versionMissing: PCF {{version}} has not been uploaded yet.

requests.subtitle: Manage incoming PCF data requests from your partners and customers
requests.searchPlaceholder: Search by Part ID, Part Name, or Requester...

editor.validatedMsg: Your PCF data has been validated and is ready to be saved.
editor.validationFailedMsg: The PCF data does not match the expected schema. Please fix the errors or upload a new file.
editor.pendingMsg: Please validate the PCF data before saving.
editor.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a JSON file.
editor.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
editor.invalidFormat: Invalid PCF format. Expected a JSON object.
editor.loadedSuccess: PCF data loaded successfully. Please validate before saving.
editor.parseError: Failed to parse JSON file. Please check the file format.
editor.readError: Failed to read file. Please try again.
editor.validationRequired: Please validate the PCF data before saving.
editor.noSchemaValidation: PCF data accepted (no schema validation available).
editor.formBuilderSuccess: PCF data created with Form Builder and ready to save.

notifications.pcfDelivered: PCF data has been delivered to the requester

participantDialog.title: Notify Participants
participantDialog.subtitle: Select participants to notify about this PCF update
participantDialog.noParticipants: No participants have requested PCF data for this part. The update will be saved but no notifications will be sent.
participantDialog.interestedCount: {{count}} participant(s) interested in this PCF data

rejectDialog.title: Reject PCF Request
rejectDialog.subtitle: Provide a reason for rejecting this request
rejectDialog.selectOrWrite: Select a common reason or write your own below
rejectDialog.reasonPlaceholder: Provide a detailed reason for rejecting this request...
rejectDialog.reasonHelper: This message will be visible to the requester

exchange.title: PCF Exchange
exchange.subtitle: Manage PCF data and respond to incoming requests
exchange.pcfUpdateSent: PCF update sent to {{count}} participant(s) successfully.

dualWizard.title: Dual PCF Creation (v9.0.0 + v7.0.0)
dualWizard.subtitle: Create and reconcile both PCF versions before saving
dualWizard.step1Desc: Upload a PCF v9.0.0 JSON file or open the form editor. This is the canonical version.
dualWizard.step2Desc: Upload a PCF v7.0.0 JSON file or open the form editor. Fields from v9.0.0 will be pre-filled automatically.
dualWizard.step2AutoFillNote: Fields already defined in v9.0.0 will be automatically pre-filled when you open the v7.0.0 form editor.
dualWizard.consistent: Both versions are consistent. Ready to save.
dualWizard.reconcileTitle: {{count}} difference(s) found between v9.0.0 and v7.0.0
dualWizard.reconcileSubtitle: Click a version value to select it, or enter a custom value.
dualWizard.dropVersionMismatch: Detected PCF v{{detected}} — expected v{{expected}}. Data loaded anyway.
dualWizard.step1NextTooltip: Upload or fill v9.0.0 data first
dualWizard.step2NextTooltip: Upload or fill v7.0.0 data first
dualWizard.tooltipDropZone: Drag & drop a PCF JSON file here, or click to browse your files
dualWizard.tooltipFormEditorV9: Open the interactive v9.0.0 form editor. Pre-filled with existing data if already loaded.
dualWizard.tooltipFormEditorV7: Open the v7.0.0 form editor. Fields from v9.0.0 will be automatically pre-filled.
dualWizard.tooltipRefreshV9: Overwrite shared fields in v7.0.0 with the current values from v9.0.0. This only affects fields that exist in both versions.
dualWizard.tooltipNextV7: Validate v9.0.0 data against the schema and proceed to define v7.0.0
dualWizard.tooltipValidateContinue: Validate v7.0.0 data against the schema and proceed to the reconciliation review
dualWizard.tooltipValidateBoth: Validate both PCF versions against their schemas
dualWizard.tooltipContinueDisabled: Validate the data first to continue
dualWizard.tooltipSave: Save both PCF versions to the catalog
dualWizard.tooltipSaveBoth: Save both PCF versions to the catalog. All field differences must be resolved first.
dualWizard.tooltipV9Column: Click to select the v9.0.0 value for this field
dualWizard.tooltipV7Column: Click to select the v7.0.0 value for this field
dualWizard.tooltipManualEntry: Enter a custom value that will be applied to both versions for this field
dualWizard.tooltipBackToV9: Return to Step 1 to edit v9.0.0 data
dualWizard.tooltipBackToV7: Return to Step 2 to edit v7.0.0 data
dualWizard.validationFailed: {{count}} error(s) found — please fix before proceeding
dualWizard.manualErrorRange: Value is outside the allowed range
dualWizard.tooltipFixErrors: Open editor to fix validation errors

versionStateHint.PENDIENTE: {{version}} is ready and will be uploaded on save

dualWizard.savePartialHint: Some versions failed. Fix the issue and click Save again — only the pending version(s) will be retried.
dualWizard.individualReconcileHint: Individual update: review the fields shared with the other version below and decide whether it must be updated too.

overview.title: Carbon Footprint Overview
overview.subtitle: Representative data shared across both PCF versions

compare.title: v9.0.0 vs v7.0.0
compare.match: Both versions report the same value
compare.mismatch: The two versions report different values
